rationale: The two papers share a plausible methodological overlap (both use Spotify/acoustic multimedia features and machine-learning-style modeling in marketing contexts), which means the cited work could be a method or precedent source rather than a pure background mention. However, the evidence provided includes only a DOI match with no in-text citation context or reference text, and the substantive domains/outcomes differ (TV ad tuning vs. album success), so importance cannot be confirmed from current evidence.
